title: gonocarpus urceolatus
intro: Gonocarpus urceolatus, also known as the water milfoil, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Gonocarpus urceolatus is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
